properties.validation_message: Enter the pixel dimensions that the image should be cropped to (ex. 300x300)

description:
## Product Carousel
A rotating display of products that allows users to scroll through featured, trending, or recommended items. This component is great for increasing visibility to popular, relevant, or related products within a limited space.
name: Product Carousel
preview:
